summary: Final Game state - Extra Innings Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON

steps.action:
WHEN a game has completed
AND more than 9 innings were played

**NOTES:**
epgv3 key values
"abstractGameState": "Final",
"codedGameState": "F",
"detailedState": "Final",
"statusCode": "F",
"startTimeTBD": false,
"abstractGameCode": "F",
"currentInning": 11,
steps.result: THEN 'FINAL' is displayed in white text left justified below the match-up header
